excavators.sales_pitch: LiuGong 922E matches CAT 320 on power and weight at 30% lower CapEx with Cummins engine commonality.
LiuGong 922E exceeds Komatsu PC200 on power and capacity at significantly lower total cost of ownership.
LiuGong 922E offers Cummins engine reliability and stronger dealer support network vs SANY.

wheel_loaders.sales_pitch: LiuGong 856H matches CAT 966 performance at 35% lower acquisition cost with proven ZF axles.
LiuGong 856H delivers comparable breakout force and bucket capacity with lower fuel consumption.

motor_graders.sales_pitch: LiuGong 4180D matches CAT 140 moldboard control and power with 40% lower upfront investment.
LiuGong 4180D provides equivalent grading precision with stronger parts availability in East Africa.

bulldozers.sales_pitch: LiuGong B230C delivers CAT D6 comparable push power and undercarriage durability at 45% lower cost.
LiuGong B230C offers superior operator comfort and global parts network vs Shantui.

rollers.sales_pitch: LiuGong 6611E matches CAT CS74 compaction performance with simplified maintenance and lower parts cost.
LiuGong 6620E delivers Bomag-grade compaction force with faster local service response.

forklifts.sales_pitch: LiuGong CLG2025 matches Toyota 8FG25 lift capacity and height at 25% lower cost with Cummins power.
LiuGong CLG2025 exceeds Komatsu FG25 on lift height and engine power with better East African dealer coverage.
